mapper.select: SELECT `id`, `brand`, `name`, `price`, `discount_rate` AS discountRate, `delivery_fee` AS deliveryFee, `stock`, `pet_type` AS petType, `sub_category_id` AS subCategoryId, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`product` ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT `id`, `brand`, `name`, `price`, `discount_rate` AS discountRate, `delivery_fee` AS deliveryFee, `stock`, `pet_type` AS petType, `sub_category_id` AS subCategoryId, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`product` WHERE `id` = #{id}
